role_title: Senior Associate, Dasher Fleet Growth Strategy

level_signals: Title is 'Senior Associate' — below Manager level
Comp range $83K-$122K base, consistent with associate-level IC at DoorDash
Reports to Manager, Dasher Fleet Growth Strategy

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2+ years of experience in strategy, analytics, consulting, technology, marketing, finance, or operations.
You are comfortable working with data, including writing SQL queries and building models in Excel or Google Sheets.
You have experience analyzing experiments or performance tests and translating results into recommendations.
You communicate clearly and can explain complex findings to both technical and non-technical audiences.
You are organized, collaborative, and comfortable working in a fast-moving environment.

scope.surface: Dasher Fleet Growth Strategy — Dasher acquisition, referrals program, supply forecasting, incentive strategy across all markets
primary_metrics_inferred: Referrals channel performance and spend efficiency
core_responsibilities: Investigate weekly performance variance and conduct deep, ad hoc analyses on acquisition, supply-demand balance, incentive efficiency, and market-level dynamics
Translate complex datasets into clear executive-ready narratives with actionable recommendations
Proactively surface emerging risks and opportunities that may impact supply
Serve as the end-to-end owner of the Dasher referrals acquisition channel: Lead forecasting, incentive strategy, and weekly spend allocation
Proactively identify volatility, risks, or structural inefficiencies
Partner across Analytics, Product, Strategy & Ops, and Finance to align on targets, pacing, and roadmap priorities
Drive clarity and alignment on trade-offs to enable disciplined decision-making

green_flags: Equity grants mentioned in addition to base
High visibility role with clear ownership of Dasher referrals channel
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Clear reporting structure (reports to Manager, Dasher Fleet Growth Strategy)
Role operates at intersection of growth, marketplace economics, and logistics — broad learning opportunity
red_flags: Location type is unclear — JD does not explicitly state remote, hybrid, or onsite for this role; NYC notice implies potential NYC association but is not definitive
No preferred/nice-to-have qualifications listed — requirements may be intentionally sparse, making evaluation criteria opaque
Pay range is wide ($39K spread) and localized by geography, which may compress actual offer for some markets
